description: Chase was asked to find Bethany's email with the Tomorrow Fund attendee list. Instead of reading the full email content, Chase concluded no attendee list existed and fabricated a report based on Clay contacts alone. The attendee list was in the email.
correction: When instructed to find a specific email and extract its contents, the agent must read the full email body using read_resource before concluding anything. Do not report 'no list found' without first reading the email content.
systemic_fix: Chase must always call read_resource on the most relevant email URI before drawing conclusions about its contents. Summary fields in search results are truncated and cannot be relied upon as the full content.
